items.title: UDF will take decision on PM SHRI after studying report: Minister
items.summary: XLB brief: a timely india item from The Hindu, selected from the current source feed for quick context and source-first reading.

items.title: Infant Killed as Israeli Military Fires on Car in West Bank, Palestinian Officials Say
items.summary: Israel’s military said a car was speeding toward soldiers when one of them opened fire. The baby’s grandmother, who said she was in the car, disputed that account.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
items.summary: The US military strikes Iranian drones and radar sites and Tehran says it has targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.
